intro:
There is not enough information about the plant × Dactylodenia evansii. However, I can provide information on Dactylodenia or Dactylorhiza evansii if that is what you are referring to. 

Dactylorhiza evansii, often referred to as × Dactylodenia evansii, is a rare orchid species native to North America. 

The plant is used for its medicinal properties and is reported to have health benefits such as wound healing, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. 

Bioactive constituents of Dactylorhiza evansii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. 

Herbal preparations made from Dactylorhiza evansii include tinctures, infusions, and dried extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
